description: A bioinformatics core facility scientist needs to build a reusable automated analysis workflow using UGENE's Workflow Designer. Create a workflow that reads protein sequences from ~/UGENE_Data/hemoglobin_beta_multispecies.fasta, aligns them using ClustalW, and writes the alignment output to ~/UGENE_Data/workflow_results/hemoglobin_aligned.aln. Save the completed workflow schema to ~/UGENE_Data/workflow_results/alignment_pipeline.uwl.
